verdict: The corpus maps onto four load-bearing TRUNKS (Μ-δ/М-5 cross-scale, Μ-α/М-1+М-6 pressure/forced-choice, Μ-γ/М-3 substrate-grounds-all, Μ-β autonomous-world) and five single-limb BRANCHES (М-4 institutions, М-2 geography, personal-transformation arcs, strategic clocks, emergent-narrative generation). Dominant structural defect: Μ-γ/М-3 — the one meta-pattern declared universal (T-01 "Systems: ALL", P-14 "every play mode") — is the most severed, amputated at combat_engine_v1, articulation, faction_behavior math, and 7/9 NPC faction trees. Mirror-image: the entire М-7..М-11 phenomenology tier (T-31/33/34/35/37/38/39/40) is a declared throughline limb with NO mechanic (orphan), while live mechanics (territory temperament, Consolidation turtle, Recall +2D) carry no throughline (trunkless). The М-5 collision trunk is delivered bottom-up but not top-down.
key_points: TRUNK = 4 meta-patterns in nearly every dossier: М-5 cross-scale (collision-engine spine), М-1+М-6 pressure/forced-choice, М-3 substrate-grounds-all (P-14), Μ-β autonomous-world.
М-3 is the trunk with severed limbs: T-01 declares Systems:ALL but combat_engine_v1 (ED-911), articulation, faction_behavior α/β/γ/λ math, and 7/9 npc faction trees carry zero Thread hooks.

BRANCHES (one limb each): М-4 institutions (faction+npc), М-2 geography (settlement+mass_battle terrain+calamity_radiation), personal-transformation arcs T-12/13/16/17 (threadwork+conviction), strategic clocks T-04..07/20/25 (victory+peninsular_strain), emergent-narrative T-23/24 (npc+faction, rendered by articulation).

ORPHAN throughlines (grep-verified): T-31/33/34/35/37/38/39/40 — the whole М-7..М-11 phenomenology tier — appear only in designs/audit synthesis+workplan docs and the registry, never in threadwork_v30 or any subsystem head.

Secondary orphans: T-02/T-30 (rendering=consciousness, information-asymmetry) home to investigation_systems_v30, which no dossier lane audited; T-26/27/28/29 'design-complete, impl-pending' with prose-only homes.
TRUNKLESS mechanics (why-gap): territory temperament α/β (inert, no consumer), Institutional Consolidation passive recovery (anti-М-1 rest state), Recall +2D (anti-М-6 cost-hidden).
articulation is the rendering terminus for T-23/T-24 ('the game's emergent narrative engine') yet is Thread/battle/era-blind — drops exactly the throughlines it exists to render.
Μ-β autonomous-world contradicted at the letter by faction_layer_v30 §5.8 (GM controls NPC votes).
Final report should be organized by the four trunks; the М-3 severance is the spine.

trunk: Μ-δ / М-5 scales-connect-through-substrate — the cross-scale collision-engine spine; every dossier carries a cross-scale edge (Domain Echo, Obligations/Mandate, Part D/E, LPS-2e, GD-1, Key emit/observe)

Μ-α / М-1 pressure-continuous + М-6 forced-choice — clocks (MS/RS T-04, TC T-05, IP T-06, Turmoil T-07, Campaign Supply, Coherence) and scarcity; carried by mass_battle, faction, settlement, victory, threadwork
Μ-γ / М-3 substrate-grounds-all (P-14 inseparability) — T-01 Systems:ALL; the trunk declared universal but most severed (combat/articulation/faction-math/7-of-9-npc-trees)
Μ-β autonomous-agent-composition — autonomous world (T-23/24/25, priority trees, accounting, clocks); carried by npc_behavior, faction, victory; contradicted by faction_layer §5.8

branches.branch: М-4 institutions stake substrate-postures (T-08/09/11/15a/b/c, T-21, T-27, T-39)
branches.carries: faction_political + npc_behavior — 6 faction sheets, priority trees, Conviction architecture

branches.branch: М-2 geography holds pressure (T-18 Radiation Gradient, T-19 Southernmost)
personal-transformation arc cluster (T-12 Practitioner, T-13 Certainty, T-16 Knot, T-17 Companion; Ω-b/М-6)
strategic-clock cluster (T-04/05/06/07, T-20 Two Contests, T-25 Generational)
emergent-narrative generation (T-23 NPC Arc Emergence, T-24 Convergence-as-Crisis)
branches.carries: npc_behavior + faction produce it; articulation renders it (but Thread/battle/era-blind)

orphan_throughlines: T-31 Reflexive Suspension — Proposed/Wave1; no head (grep: only audit synthesis)
T-33 TS Developmental Arc — Proposed; receptive-capacity vocab absent from threadwork_v30
T-34 Distal Interoception through Knot Tethers — Proposed; 'seismographic'/'distal interoception' only in synthesis docs
T-35 Unified Uncanny Capacity Synthesis — Proposed/Wave4; no mechanical head
T-37 Stimulus Resistance Triplet — Proposed; no head
T-38 Real as Continuous Amplitude — Proposed; environmental-design only, no ratified head
T-39 Textual Mode Typology — Proposed/Wave2; no head
T-40 TS as Taxonomic Expansion — Proposed; no head
T-02 Rendering=Consciousness-Performed + T-30 Information Asymmetry — home is investigation_systems_v30, un-audited by any dossier lane
T-26/T-27/T-28/T-29 — 'design complete, implementation pending'; prose-only homes (baralta/faction/world), no mechanical head
trunkless_mechanics: Territory temperament α/β (territory_temperaments_v30) — zero mechanical consumption anywhere; mechanic with no throughline
Institutional Consolidation passive recovery (faction_layer_v30 §1.3) — Stability+1/Accord+1 for a null season; anti-М-1 rest state
Recall +2D near-costless citation (social_contest_v30 §4 Step 3) — anti-М-6 cost-hidden checkbox, no throughline
Meta-lanes trunkless by nature (not defects but stale where trunks are live): registers_graphs shape artifacts + recent_infra steering docs

findings.claim: The Μ-γ/М-3 'substrate grounds all' trunk — declared universal by T-01 (Systems:ALL) and P-14 — is severed at four major limbs at once: combat_engine_v1, articulation_layer_v30, the faction_behavior_v30 α/β/γ/λ engine math, and 7 of 9 NPC faction priority trees, all carrying zero Thread hooks; the one meta-pattern declared load-bearing everywhere is the most-broken.

The entire М-7..М-11 phenomenology meta-tier — T-31/33/34/35/37/38/39/40 — is declared canonical in throughlines_complete.md but implemented by no ratified subsystem head; grep for its signature vocabulary hits only designs/audit synthesis and workplan docs, never threadwork_v30 or any design head, so a whole throughline limb is registry-resident and mechanically absent.
findings.cite: references/throughlines_complete.md T-31..T-41 ('Implementation status: Proposed. Wave N'); grep 'reflexive suspension|distal interoception|seismographic|Textual Mode' → only designs/audit/*

findings.claim: The М-5 cross-scale trunk that carries emergent narrative is delivered bottom-up (Domain Echo: capped, timed, enumerated) but not top-down: the §12.4 down-seam targets[] are emitter-unpopulated, scene.combat_resolved's declared consumers do not consume it, and the §3.8 Scene→Mass bonus is never hooked in mass_battle's turn structure — the collision spine is one-directional in practice.
findings.cite: references/scale_transitions_v30.md §7 vs §12.4; 02_interdependency_map.md (b) item 2; scale_transitions_v30 §3.8 vs mass_battle_v30.md §A.7
findings.tracked_ref: propagation_spec_v1 §5 decision-queue item 18; module_contracts personal_combat gap_notes A4

findings.claim: Articulation is the designated rendering terminus for T-23/T-24 — canonically 'the game's emergent narrative engine' — yet is Thread/Coherence/Calamity-silent, omits scene.battle_concluded and scene.investigation_resolved from its trigger table, and is blind to victory era-transitions; the surface drops exactly the throughlines it exists to render.
findings.cite: designs/articulation/articulation_layer_v30.md §3.1; references/throughlines_complete.md T-24; references/module_contracts.yaml L679 (era transitions UNKEYED, ED-1006)

findings.claim: Three live mechanics serve no throughline: territory temperament α/β (zero mechanical consumption anywhere), Institutional Consolidation passive recovery (an anti-М-1 rest state), and the +2D Recall citation (an anti-М-6 near-costless checkbox) — mechanics without a why, the inverse of the orphan-throughline gap.

T-02 (Rendering=Consciousness-Performed) and T-30 (Information Asymmetry — canonically 'the gap between player and character knowledge IS the gameplay') home to investigation_systems_v30.md, which no dossier lane in this audit covered, leaving a whole epistemic/perception throughline limb outside the audited surface — a scope gap the synthesis must flag, not treat as absent.
findings.cite: references/throughlines_complete.md T-02/T-30; designs/scene/investigation_systems_v30.md (exists, un-dossiered); 12-dossier subsystem list (no investigation/fieldwork lane)
